summary: Frontend testing for GIF picker and Lineup Settings toggles. GIF picker is WORKING correctly - GIFs are clickable and send successfully. Lineup Settings toggles have a BUG - API calls succeed but toggle visual state doesn't update due to stale closure in useEffect.

ui_bugs.issue: Toggle visual state doesn't update after API call succeeds. The useEffect sync at Bookings.js line 1365-1372 has a stale closure issue - selectedCrewBooking inside the effect is stale because it's not in the dependency array.

integration_issues.issue: API call succeeds (toast shows 'Lineup is now visible to nearby surfers!') but toggle UI doesn't reflect the change. The selectedCrewBooking state is not being synced with the updated bookings data.

action_items: Fix the stale closure issue in Bookings.js useEffect (lines 1365-1372). The selectedCrewBooking value inside the effect is stale. Solution: Use a ref to track the selected booking ID, or use a functional update pattern like: setSelectedCrewBooking(prev => prev ? bookings.find(b => b.id === prev.id) || prev : null)
Alternative fix: In LineupManagerDrawer.js, after the API call succeeds, update the local state optimistically before calling onRefresh
critical_code_review_comments: Bookings.js line 1365-1372: useEffect has [bookings] dependency but references selectedCrewBooking inside - this is a React stale closure bug
The GIF picker fix is working correctly - pointer-events-none on img and button wrapper are functioning as expected

success_rate.frontend: 50% - GIF picker works, Lineup toggles have visual sync bug

context_for_next_testing_agent: GIF picker in MessagesPage.js is working correctly - clicking GIFs sends them to the conversation. The Lineup Settings toggles in LineupManagerDrawer.js have a state sync bug - the API call works but the UI doesn't update. The root cause is a stale closure in the useEffect at Bookings.js lines 1365-1372.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Lineup Settings toggles don't update visually after clicking
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Stale closure in useEffect. The useEffect at Bookings.js lines 1365-1372 has [bookings] as dependency but references selectedCrewBooking inside. When bookings updates, the effect runs but selectedCrewBooking is the stale value from when the effect was created.
reproduction_steps: 4. Click the 'Open to Nearby Surfers' toggle
5. Observe: Toast shows success but toggle stays in OFF position
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Fix the useEffect to use a functional update pattern or use a ref to track the selected booking ID
